pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup/export scripts utilize Bonsai IFC authoring tools for actors and project directory.
Task instructions and scripts involve IFC, BIM, organizations, and actor assignment.
Prompt explicitly states 'You are a BIM Coordinator'.
Context of task (BIM, IFC, construction participants) fits construction management.
Checked export_result.sh which explicitly defines and writes to RESULT_FILE='/tmp/stakeholder_result.json'.
Checked setup_task.sh which explicitly generates the brief at this file path.
Checked setup_task.sh which specifies 'Karlsruhe Institute of Technology', 'ArchitekturBuro FZK', and 'KlarGlas GmbH', and export_result.sh checks for these exact string substrings.
Checked setup_task.sh instructions and export_result.sh which evaluates actor assignments matching 'KlarGlas'.
Checked setup_task.sh instructions and export_result.sh which checks for 'IfcWindow' in RelatedObjects.
Executed ifcopenshell python script against the FZK-Haus ifc model and counted exactly 11 IfcWindow instances.
Checked setup_task.sh instructions and export_result.sh which specifically reads this file to assess the final task output.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for blenderbim_env project_stakeholder_actor_assignment task by analyzing the FZK-Haus IFC model using ifcopenshell and verifying task scripts. Confirmed the task uses a synthetic stakeholder brief dynamically generated in setup_task.sh. Exactly verified that the 'fzk_haus.ifc' model contains exactly 11 'IfcWindow' elements. Verified all explicitly required organizations ('Karlsruhe', 'Architektur', 'KlarGlas') and expected output file paths explicitly match the task description and export_result.sh queries.
